info.title: dotnet-jwk
info.description: Command line tool for managing JWK (JSON Web keys)

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: oct
commands.description: Creates a new JWK of type 'oct'

options.name: length
options.description: Length in bits of the key. Must be between 8 and 512.

options.name: output-path
options.description: The shared key output path.

options.name: password
options.description: The password for the key encryption.

options.name: iteration-count
options.description: The iteration count used for the password derivation.

options.name: salt-size
options.description: The salt size in bytes used for the password derivation.

options.name: alg
options.description: The algorithm intended for use with the key. Supported algorithms are HS256, HS384, HS512, A128KW, A192KW, A256KW, A128GCMKW, A192GCMKW, A256GCMKW, dir

options.name: use
options.description: The public key intended use (sig, enc).

options.name: key-ops
options.description: The operation for which the key is intended to be used (sign, verify, encrypt, encrypt, wrapKey, unwrapKey, deriveBits).

options.name: kid
options.description: The key identifier.

options.name: no-kid
options.description: Does not auto-generate a key identifier.

options.name: force
options.description: Erase the output file whether it exist.

options.name: verbose
options.description: Show verbose output.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: RSA
commands.description: Creates a new JWK of type 'RSA'

options.name: length
options.description: Length in bits of the key. Must be between 0 and 16384.

options.name: output-path
options.description: The private key output path.

options.name: public-output-path
options.description: The public key output path.

options.name: password
options.description: The password for the key encryption.

options.name: iteration-count
options.description: The iteration count used for the password derivation.

options.name: salt-size
options.description: The salt size in bytes used for the password derivation.

options.name: alg
options.description: The algorithm intended for use with the key. Supported algorithms are RS256, RS384, RS512, PS256, PS384, PS512, RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256, RSA-OAEP-384, RSA-OAEP-512

options.name: use
options.description: The public key intended use (sig, enc).

options.description: The operation for which the key is intended to be used (sign, verify, encrypt, encrypt, wrapKey, unwrapKey, deriveBits).

commands.name: EC
commands.description: Creates a new JWK of type 'EC'

options.name: curve
options.description: The elliptical curve name. Supported curves: P-256, P-384, P-521, secp256k1.

options.name: output-path
options.description: The private key output path.

options.name: public-output-path
options.description: The public key output path.

options.name: password
options.description: The password for the key encryption.

options.name: iteration-count
options.description: The iteration count used for the password derivation.

options.name: salt-size
options.description: The salt size in bytes used for the password derivation.

options.name: alg
options.description: The algorithm intended for use with the key. Supported algorithms are ES256, ES384, ES512, ECDH-ES, ECDH-ES+A128KW, ECDH-ES+A192KW, ECDH-ES+A256KW

options.name: use
options.description: The public key intended use (sig, enc).
